transcript: Speaker A (AI Avatar): english ಬರಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ 2 Years ಇಂದ ಹೇಳ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೀಯಾ [You've been saying you don't know English for 2 years.] Speaker B (Human): ಯಾರ್ ಗುರು ನೀನು? [Who are you, guru?] Speaker A: ನಾನು MySivi AI Teacher. [I am MySivi AI Teacher.] Speaker B: ನನ್ ಹತ್ರ Time ಇಲ್ಲ, ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ಲಿ? [I don't have time, what should I do?] Speaker A: ದಿನ ಎರಡು ಗಂಟೆ reels ನೋಡ್ತೀಯಾ, ನನಗೆ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಕೂಡ ಕೊಡೋಕೆ ಆಗಲ್ವಾ? [You watch reels for two hours a day, can't you give me even 15 minutes?] Speaker B: ದುಡ್ಡು ಕೊಡಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ Boss? [We have to pay money, right Boss?] Speaker A: ನೀನು ಬರಿ 1 Rupee ಇಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. [You can start with just 1 Rupee.] Speaker B: ನಿಜಾನಾ? [Really?] Speaker A: ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 Crores+ people MySivi ಯೂಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [That's why 1 Crore+ people are using MySivi.] Speaker B: ಸರಿ ಈಗಲೇ Join ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Okay, I will join right now.] Speaker A: MySivi App install ಮಾಡಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ English journey ಯನ್ನ ಇಂದೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Install MySivi App and start your English journey today.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: english ಬರಲ್ಲ [don't know English] ಅಂತ 2 Years ಇಂದ [saying this for 2 years] ಯಾರ್ ಗುರು ನೀನು? [Who are you, guru?] ನಾನು [I am] Ai Teacher. ನನ್ ಹತ್ರ Time [I don't have time] ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ಲಿ [what should I do] ದಿನ [daily] 15 MIN ಕೊಡ ಕೊಡೋಕೆ ಆಗಲ್ವಾ? [can't you give?] ದುಡ್ಡು ಕೊಡಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ [have to pay money, right] Boss ನೀನು ಬರಿ [you just] 1 Rupee ಶುರು ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [can start] ನಿಜಾನಾ? [Really?] ಅದಕ್ಕೆ [That's why] 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE MySivi ಸರಿ ಈಗಲೇ Join [Okay, join right now] MySivi App Install ಮಾಡಿ [Install MySivi App] English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen Kannada ad featuring an AI avatar and a human actor. The AI teacher encourages the user to spend 15 minutes daily on MySivi instead of scrolling reels, offering a starting price of 1 Rupee. It ends with a CTA to install the app.
